case_title: BENEFICIAL OF CALIFORNIA, INC.DBA BENEFICIAL VS ABON, LUIS C.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,199.10 FILED BY BENEFICIAL OF CALIFORNIA, INC.DBA BENEFICIAL CREDIT SERVICE . AS TO DEFENDANT ABON, LUIS C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ABON, LUIS C.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL OF CALIFORNIA, INC.DBA BENEFICIAL CREDIT SERVICE . RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ABON, LUIS C. $1,066.01 PRINCIPAL, $35.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,101.80 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $168.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $18.63 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT ABON, LUIS C.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ABON, LUIS C.
